title: Classic Flowers
description: Brings back the classic Dandelion & Rose textures with modern coloration. Also retextures the Wither Rose.
body:
This pack reintroduces the Classic Flower textures from vintage Minecraft.
They have been carefully recolored to blend in seamlessly with the modern [Jappa](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Texture_Update) style.
``` This pack is MIT! Use it how you'd like. ```
# Rose, replaces the Poppy ![rose_transition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd1162688b77d9bc554a442351fec242674f9fd9.gif) ![rotating rose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47d690dd6da03d8b14458bc8773fd6f3a1d38981.gif)
# Dandelion, classic version returns ![dandelion transition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3e00ceb8b7069ac776ca4138d9d4d01013b6eee.gif) ![rotating dandelion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a63246d9d206ad80722a1c502441c2c14c1e2a0.gif)
# Wither Rose, retextured as a black Rose ![wither rose transition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/425d3a0a106562694f83949a52ae42687aac43ed.gif) ![rotating wither rose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b91ca8a4d92e721fb3e13ca8d84d8079d3d8d0aa.gif)
![emerald](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8dcbbb02123519ca995198ea5befa002d4844143.png) :P
